notes: Seti Astro Suite Pro V1.15.10  Major UX update for MacOS users.  Tool UI's should now stay on top even if you click off of them.  Other updates: major memory optimizations in clone stamp and blemish blaster.  Refresh dropdowns button in Narrowband Integration  V1.15.0–1.15.9 New tools: Dither Analysis, Narrowband Integration.  Extra Features: Planetary Stacker, Hyperbolic Stretch, and Luminosity blending in Layers. Major updates to the Stacking Suite (comet stacking, L recombination, execution monitor, session persistence), PDF support, macOS Homebrew distribution, Python 3.13/3.14 support, and Aberration Remover GPU improvements. Numerous bug fixes across GHS, WIMI, hardware acceleration install, and more.
